sample_hooks: On August 19, 2020, Russian politician Alexei Navalny was shooting this campaign video... Navalny had been poisoned. (Doc 5 — narrative incident)
On January 23rd, a family in China traveled from Wuhan... Within a few days, other members of the family started showing symptoms. (Doc 4 — narrative anecdote)
I was adopted by a white missionary couple... they took the idea that they were saving me, saving us from ourselves. (Doc 10 — personal testimony)
On March 5th, 2022, Russian gymnast Ivan Kuliak stepped on the podium... attaching this symbol to his uniform: three pieces of white tape, forming the letter Z. (Doc 7 — anecdotal/event-based)
This chart shows China's birth and death rate over the last 60 years... in 2022, China had more deaths than births for the first time in 6 decades. (Doc 9 — statistic)
